final:
module eeprom_cell (
    input wire clk,
    input wire we,
    input wire [7:0] data_in,
    output reg [7:0] data_out
);
    reg [7:0] cell_data;

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (we) begin
            cell_data <= data_in; // Write operation
        end
        data_out <= cell_data; // Read operation
    end
endmodule
